blocks.text: made from the designated teaching load for every research/creative work/extension externally funded with a grant of not lower than 1 million pesos (Php 1M), provided that the deducted number of hours shall not be more than fifty (50) percent of the specified teaching hours so as not to jeopardize instruction, provided further that no faculty member shall be entitled of monetary incentive if granted with load release(s). The aforementioned release hours shall be availed until such time the project/program is officially terminated.
Section 19 For a faculty student enrolled in the doctorate degree

program aligned/allied to his/her field of specialization from a reputable institution shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, provided that he/she has officially enrolled at least 9 units in a term.
Section 20 Student faculty member who is on dissertation writing

shall avail of the six (6) units study load credit. Faculty members whose fields of specialization are on moratorium shall not be entitled to administrative support such as, but not limited to, financial assistance, official time for dissertation-related activities, among others.
Section 21 For faculty student who is either a full-fledged master’s

degree or a doctorate degree holder already and intends to pursue another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution for the vertical alignment of his/her field of specialization shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, except for fields of specialization on moratorium.
Section 22 Faculty members with study load credit (SLC) should not

be assigned any overload teaching. If a student faculty member is being considered for overload honorarium, the SLC shall not be counted except under an emergency situation as in the following example: a faculty member, in the middle of a semester, leaves the service (for whatever reason), and the department/college cannot find a replacement/substitute except a faculty student. In this case, the student faculty member should be compensated additionally.
Section 23 In the exigency of service, the University may opt for
assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the

fixed_blocks.text:
13 made from the designated teaching load for every research/creative work/extension externally funded with a grant of not lower than 1 million pesos (Php 1M), provided that the deducted number of hours shall not be more than fifty (50) percent of the specified teaching hours so as not to jeopardize instruction, provided further that no faculty member shall be entitled of monetary incentive if granted with load release(s). The aforementioned release hours shall be availed until such time the project/program is officially terminated.

Section 19 For a faculty student enrolled in the doctorate degree program aligned/allied to his/her field of specialization from a reputable institution, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, provided that he/she has officially enrolled at least 9 units in a term.

Section 20 Student faculty member who is on dissertation writing, shall avail of the six (6) units study load credit. Faculty members whose fields of specialization are on moratorium, shall not be entitled to administrative support such as, but not limited to, financial assistance, official time for dissertation-related activities, among others.

Section 21 For faculty student who is either a full-fledged master’s degree or a doctorate degree holder already and intends to pursue another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution for the vertical alignment of his/her field of specialization, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, except for fields of specialization on moratorium.

Section 22 Faculty members with study load credit (SLC) should not be assigned any overload teaching. If a student faculty member is being considered for overload honorarium, the SLC shall not be counted, except under an emergency situation as in the following example: a faculty member, in the middle of a semester, leaves the service (for whatever reason), and the department/college cannot find a replacement/substitute except a faculty student. In this case, the student faculty member should be compensated additionally.

Section 23 In the exigency of service, the University may opt for assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the

qa_pairs.context:
13 made from the designated teaching load for every research/creative work/extension externally funded with a grant of not lower than 1 million pesos (Php 1M), provided that the deducted number of hours shall not be more than fifty (50) percent of the specified teaching hours so as not to jeopardize instruction, provided further that no faculty member shall be entitled of monetary incentive if granted with load release(s). The aforementioned release hours shall be availed until such time the project/program is officially terminated.

Section 19 For a faculty student enrolled in the doctorate degree program aligned/allied to his/her field of specialization from a reputable institution, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, provided that he/she has officially enrolled at least 9 units in a term.

Section 20 Student faculty member who is on dissertation writing, shall avail of the six (6) units study load credit. Faculty members whose fields of specialization are on moratorium, shall not be entitled to administrative support such as, but not limited to, financial assistance, official time for dissertation-related activities, among others.

Section 21 For faculty student who is either a full-fledged master’s degree or a doctorate degree holder already and intends to pursue another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution for the vertical alignment of his/her field of specialization, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, except for fields of specialization on moratorium.

Section 22 Faculty members with study load credit (SLC) should not be assigned any overload teaching. If a student faculty member is being considered for overload honorarium, the SLC shall not be counted, except under an emergency situation as in the following example: a faculty member, in the middle of a semester, leaves the service (for whatever reason), and the department/college cannot find a replacement/substitute except a faculty student. In this case, the student faculty member should be compensated additionally.

Section 23 In the exigency of service, the University may opt for assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the
qa_pairs.question: What is the designated teaching load for faculty members who are granted external funding?
qa_pairs.answer: The designated teaching load for faculty members who are granted external funding is not lower than 1 million pesos (Php 1M), provided that the deducted number of hours shall not be more than fifty (50) percent of the specified teaching hours.

Faculty members whose fields of specialization are on moratorium, shall not be entitled to administrative support such as, but not limited to, financial assistance, official time for dissertation-related activities, among others.

Section 21 For faculty student who is either a full-fledged master’s degree or a doctorate degree holder already and intends to pursue another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution for the vertical alignment of his/her field of specialization, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, except for fields of specialization on moratorium.

In this case, the student faculty member should be compensated additionally.

qa_pairs.question: What are the strict constraints for generating question-and-answer pairs?
qa_pairs.answer: The strict constraints for generating question-and-answer pairs include: (1) generating at least 8 pairs; (2) basing questions on the extracted context only in the selected page; (3) not inventing any details; (4) providing precise, concise, and 100% accurate answers according to the context; (5) formatting output as a JSON list of objects, where each object has exactly two keys: 'question' and 'answer'; (6) not wrapping the JSON in markdown code blocks; and (7) not including any introductory or concluding text, explanations, or notes.

qa_pairs.answer: In the exigency of service, the University may opt for assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the outside.

Section 21 For faculty student who is either a full-fledged master’s degree or a doctorate degree holder already and intends to pursue another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution for the vertical alignment of his/her field of specialization, shall avail of the 3-unit study load credit, except for fields of specialization on moratorium.

Section 22 Faculty members with study load credit (SLC) should not be assigned any overload teaching. If a student faculty member is being considered for overload honorarium, the SLC shall not be counted, except under an emergency situation as in the following example: a faculty member, in the middle of a semester, leaves the service (for whatever reason), and the department/college cannot find a replacement/substitute except a faculty student. In this case, the student faculty member should be compensated additionally.

Section 23 In the exigency of service, the University may opt for assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the
qa_pairs.question: What happens if a faculty member is granted load release(s) and the project/program is officially terminated?
qa_pairs.answer: The aforementioned release hours shall be availed until such time the project/program is officially terminated.

The aforementioned release hours shall be availed until such time the project/program is officially terminated.

qa_pairs.question: Can a faculty student enrolled in a doctorate degree program avail of study load credit if they are on another postgraduate degree program?
qa_pairs.answer: No, for faculty students who are already pursuing another postgraduate degree from a reputable institution, shall not be entitled to study load credit.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if a faculty member is hired to teach additional courses beyond their regular teaching load and the University cannot find a replacement/substitute?
qa_pairs.answer: In the exigency of service, the University may opt for assigning teaching overload to regular faculty members or hire additional qualified and competent faculty from the outside.
